title: Email Finder Input
description: Find email addresses, phone numbers, and social media links from any website. No API key required.

urls.title: Website URLs
urls.description: List of website URLs to scan for contact information. Use company homepages or contact pages for best results.

scanDepth.title: Scan Depth
scanDepth.description: 'homepage' scans only the provided URL. 'deep' also automatically crawls /contact, /about, /team, and /company pages for more comprehensive results (slower but higher recall).

includePhones.title: Extract Phone Numbers
includePhones.description: Extract phone numbers from text content and tel: links.

includeSocial.title: Extract Social Media Links
includeSocial.description: Detect and extract links to Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and GitHub profiles.

filterNoreply.title: Filter No-Reply / Fake Emails
filterNoreply.description: When enabled, automatically removes common false positives like noreply@, no-reply@, example@, and image filenames that match email patterns.

delayMs.title: Request Delay (ms)
delayMs.description: Delay between requests in milliseconds. Increase for large batches to avoid rate limiting.
